name: RAG Q&A
description: Answer user questions using retrieved documents. Input guardrails: Regex (PII check) + LLM (topic relevance). Output guardrails: JavaScript (secrets/length) + Regex (refusal detection).

name: Content Analysis
description: Classify the sentiment and intent of a piece of text. Input guardrails: JavaScript (length) + Python (word count). Output guardrails: LLM (quality check) + Python (minimum content).
